description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build that runs on push to master or dev branches and on pull requests to those branches, but only for files in src/ and .gitmodules. The workflow has two jobs: build and deploy. The build job checks out the repository with submodules, sets up .NET Core 3.1.301, restores dependencies, builds Impostor.Client and Impostor.Server, and runs tests. The deploy job depends on build and only runs on release events, publishing Impostor.Server for win-x64 and linux-x64.
